_comment: SA-B3 Stellaris Auction House lot catalog. 20 lots across 5 design-doc categories. Voice-checked against character_voices.md (Cassian Velo neutral cataloguing register) and dialogue_writing_guide.md.

lots.headline: King's Repeater (Re-issue, Documented)
lots.description: A factory re-issue of the limited heavy-launcher production run. Provenance certificate present. Original drift studs replaced; the rest is to spec.

lots.headline: Overcharged Core (Sealed Re-issue)
lots.description: Talon-stamped reactor core, factory-sealed, with the original test-run logs included. Runs hot. Buyer assumes thermal handling.

lots.headline: Capital Reactor (Re-issue)
lots.description: Foundry capital reactor, late-production batch. Documentation traces every pour. Buyer covers transit and certification.

lots.headline: Drone Bay (Re-issue, Tested)
lots.description: Reyes-Kowalski drone bay re-pulled from the original tooling. Bench-tested by an independent hand. Receipts attached.

lots.headline: Broadside Battery (Re-issue, Late Production)
lots.description: Foundry broadside, last batch of the late production run. Mounting flanges trued by the workshop that sourced the lot.

lots.headline: Pre-Compact Astrolabe
lots.description: A working astrolabe from the era before the Compact. Brass plates, ivory hands, navigational lines still readable. Functional.

lots.headline: Founders' Charter Fragment
lots.description: A signed page from the original Stellaris Charter, framed under sealed glass. Authentication on file at the Guild library.

lots.headline: Aurelian Officer's War Diary
lots.description: A bound personal diary from a Frontier Alliance officer during the Reach campaigns. Pages annotated. Authenticated handwriting.

lots.headline: Signed Compact-Era Star Chart
lots.description: A printer's first edition of the Compact-era trade lanes, signed and dated by the chartmaker. Two minor folds, one corrected entry.

lots.headline: Pre-Accord Silver Service
lots.description: A complete dining service in Stellaris silver, pre-Accord hallmarks intact. Twelve settings, plus a serving piece.

lots.headline: Axiom Navigation Array
lots.description: Standard export license. Core navigational unit. The array carries Axiom Research's stamp and a current calibration certificate.

lots.headline: Guild Dispatch Crate (Sealed, Logged)
lots.description: A sealed Commerce Guild dispatch crate, contents itemized, transit logs attached. Re-sale permitted under standard procurement rules.

lots.headline: Axiom Survey Kit (Field Issue)
lots.description: A field-issue survey kit from Axiom Research's outer-system office. Sealed. Reserve floor reflects the manufacturer's licensing terms.

lots.headline: Science Collective Data Index
lots.description: A current-quarter data index of public-distribution Collective findings. Licensed for re-sale under the Collective's open-access terms.

lots.headline: Tuned Plasma Thruster
lots.description: Workshop-tuned plasma thruster from a Reyes-Kowalski racing-program donor. Bench numbers attached, signed by the tuner.

lots.headline: Calibrated Targeting Suite
lots.description: A fleet-issue targeting suite, calibrated to a known-good baseline by an independent shop. Calibration record runs three pages.

lots.headline: Hardened Shield Capacitor
lots.description: A high-cycle shield capacitor with the original burn-in logs. Reserve floor reflects the capacitor's documented service hours.

lots.headline: Inline Signal Dampener
lots.description: A signal-dampener mod legal under the current Stellaris license. Workshop-installed. Removal instructions included with the package.

lots.headline: Outer Belt Wreck Claim
lots.description: Filed claim on a Compact-era hull adrift in the outer belt. Recovery rights transfer at hammer fall. Survey log attached.

lots.headline: Inner Lane Tug Rights, Lot 14
lots.description: Recovery rights to a derelict freighter on the inner lane. Tug authorization current. Buyer assumes the standing notices on file.

lots.headline: Anchor Station Recovery Lien
lots.description: A held lien on the anchor structure of a quiet station section. Salvage rights bundled. Reserve floor reflects the lien holder's documented expenses.
